response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 15+ years across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded, plus some dev-tooling work (test frameworks, CI setup, MCP generators). However, the resume shows no people-management or team-lead role, no explicit 2+ years managing engineers, and no substantive mobile-platform ecosystem experience. The role is a people-leadership position in Engineering Productivity, and the core management requirements are not demonstrated.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience across multiple stacks and domains
Demonstrated dev-tooling and testing background (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, CI/GitLab setup, MCP tooling)
Strong community/teaching track record (workshops, Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos) indicating mentorship aptitude
concerns: No explicit people-management experience or direct reports mentioned (2 yrs required)
Lacks mobile-platform ecosystem depth relevant to the team's focus area
No evidence of organizational change leadership, roadmap ownership, or formal tech-lead role at scale
